prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFTGSBH-SML-BL-2 Product Type: ABIS_BOOK Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness The Great Speed Bag Handbook Description: Learn to proficiently hit a speed bag with the Productive Fitness Great Speed Bag Handbook.

Learning how to hit a speed bag can be tricky if you're a beginner. This handbook will show you how to hit a speed bag using easy to follow instructions and descriptive photos.

In addition to key moves, the handbook also teaches you how and where to set up a speed bag, how to wrap your hands and important safety tips.

The book is printed in color and has 64 pages. Make sure to grab this handbook before you set up your speed bag. Search Terms: personal trainer gym equipment exercise muscle groups workout Features: - Easy to Follow Instructions & Descriptive Photos === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness The Great Speed Bag Handbook

openai.item_name: Productive Fitness Great Speed Bag Handbook

anthropic.title_differentiation: 64-Page Color Guide, Easy To Follow Instructions, Hand Wrapping And Safety Tips, Setup Guide

openai.title_differentiation: Easy To Follow Instructions, Descriptive Photos, Speed Bag Setup, Hand Wrapping, Safety Tips, 64 Color Pages
